events.title: The Simpsons Album
events.blurb: Springfield sticker hunt is deep into crunch — 21 sets, 189 stickers, 29 gold stickers. Album ends July 29 and completion pressure is peaking hard; anyone sitting on a spare gold Simpsons sticker is the most-wanted person in the trading thread right now.

events.title: Krustyland Invasion (Episode Stickers Set 3)
events.blurb: Episode Stickers Set 3 runs until July 15 — 9 Simpsons stickers including gold-rarities with notoriously low drop rates. Unopened Episode Packs auto-convert to the next set when this ends, so don't sit on dupes: trade them now or they become the next set's problem.

events.title: Summer Splash
events.blurb: Summer quest chain runs all season — card dupes stack up fast during the grind. Get your H:/W: list posted before the next Cards Boom so you're first in line when supply floods the community.

talkingPoints: Watch for the next Cards Boom in Coin Master — it drops ~50% extra cards, which means a flood of duplicates. The traders who post their H:/W: *before* it hits clear the most.
Gold Card Trade events multiply rare/super-rare trade value 3–5×. If you've got golds you're sitting on, that's the window to move them and finish a set.
Pro tip: scan your whole album once and SwapDeck shows you every player who's missing a card you have spare. Beats scrolling H:/W: lists by hand.
Stuck one card from finishing a set? Post it — someone here almost certainly has it as a dupe collecting dust.
Golden cards are the hardest to move solo. The Trade Chain + group league here exist to match you with the right holder faster.

Trading safely matters: even Monopoly GO's own safe-exchange screen is being gamed (scammers switch stickers at the last second). App-mediated trades with a trade log are the only way to protect yourself.
Don't sleep on the Simpsons album's final stretch — 29 gold stickers are the real bottleneck and they only move at peak completion pressure through July 29. If you have a spare gold, list it now.

Krustyland Invasion Episode Stickers Set 3 runs through July 15 — gold-tier Episode Stickers have brutal drop rates and the community is vocal about it. If you landed one as a dupe, you're holding the most in-demand trade item of the week.

Heads up: when Krustyland Invasion ends July 15, all unopened Episode Sticker Packs convert to the NEXT set automatically. Trade your dupes before the window closes or they stop being useful for current completions.
Scopely's MONOPOLY GO!Chat app (6.5M groups, 25M messages!) is where sticker trades are being organized. SwapDeck finds your match — the trade itself gets coordinated wherever you chat.

Scam reports are a constant undercurrent in Coin Master Facebook groups — there are literally groups named 'COIN MASTER TRADE - SCAMMERS BANNED'. A trade log is your best protection in any platform trade.
Board Adventure's card trading flows through the same Coin Master channels — if you're playing both, make sure your H:/W: lists cover both games so you don't miss a cross-game trade partner.
